Headline: #43 43rd Temporary Eastbound Reroute near LaSalle/43rd
ShortDescription: Eastbound 43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 47th, State, 43rd, resume their normal route due to street blockage near LaSalle/43rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 47th, State, 43rd, resume their normal route due to street blockage near LaSalle/43rd.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #70 Division Temporary Reroute near Division/Lockwood
ShortDescription: #70 Division buses are temporary rerouted in both direction due to police activity near Division/Lockwood.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#70 Division buses are temporary rerouted due to police activity near Division/Lockwood.

  • Eastbound buses will operate via Division, Central, Augusta, Laramie and Division then over normal route.
  • Westbound buses will operate via Division, Laramie, Augusta, Central and Austin then over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
